name: > Princess Treatment.
description:

Oh darling.

Desiree has been becoming more cruel with her punishments recently. You did something to press her buttons and she decided to give some taste of your own medicine. She expects you to keep it on 25/8 with no buts, or’s, nor pleases.

How will you manage from your girlfriend? She completely dominates you!
